# CWE-1389 safe: explicit base-10 parsing
lang: go
file: CWE-1389-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1389 mitigated: ParseInt with base 10 rejects octal and hex prefixes.

import (
	"net/http"
	"strconv"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func ReserveSeatsSafe(db *sqlx.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		raw := c.Query("count")
		seats, err := strconv.ParseInt(raw, 10, 64)
		if err != nil || seats <= 0 {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid count"})
			return
		}
		showID := c.Query("show")
		_, err = db.Exec("UPDATE shows SET reserved = reserved + $1 WHERE id = $2", seats, showID)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"reserved": seats})
	}
}
